author: Jared
name: FMN v11b — Hybrid Fibonacci Manifold Network + XSA
blurb: Hybrid FMN+XSA: shared W0 constrained to W0²=W0+I (eigenvalues {φ,ψ}), 9 pure FMN layers + top-3 layers with 4-head causal attention and sparse entity memory (K=7 d_b=128). 50k steps, TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS=131072, 2×GPU. Best pre-quant 1.4137 BPB at step 47k; final int8+zlib roundtrip 1.4233 at +0.0001 quant penalty.
